welcome_subtitle: Learn the 100 and 128 official questions of the U.S. citizenship exam and pass your interview. Your path to citizenship starts here: learn step by step, for free, and in English.
progress_desc: Monitor your progress and achieve your learning goals.
what_is_natly_desc:
Natly is a project created to support thousands of immigrants in preparing for the U.S. citizenship exam for free, with interactive lessons, audio (coming soon), and quizzes designed to help you study step by step.

We are building this platform live, and your support helps it continue growing and supporting more families.
explore_title: Explore how Natly helps you pass your exam
explore_subtitle: Learn with illustrated flashcards, official questions, and guided practice, all in one place and completely free.
feature_cards_desc: Learn each question with images and audio (coming soon), step by step.
feature_questions_desc: Practice exactly what you will be asked during your interview.
feature_quiz_desc: Evaluate what you have learned and strengthen your answers.
community_desc: Your support keeps this platform free for millions of immigrants who dream of becoming citizens.
